title: Work permit: Applying at a port of entry (POE) - Canada.ca
content:
## Work permit: Applying at a port of entry (POE)
Not applying at a POE?
Check if you can apply from outside Canada or at a inside Canada .
Most foreign nationals need a work permit to work in Canada. You may be eligible for an employer-specific or open work permit.
Get the instructions to apply for a work permit at a port of entry.
$155  (unless exempt )

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
